name: Syntra
long_description:
Syntra is a real-time AI audit platform for healthcare revenue, compliance, and care quality. Our customers start with Syntra’s chart and claim audit and build additional agents from there. Our agents learn each practice’s workflows, payer rules, and software stack on its own, enabling us to give every clinic in the country the operating efficiency they need to stay independent.

Syntra has already processed over 1M patient encounters, supports hundreds of practice locations nationwide, and ensures $100Ms in medical claim collections annually.
